Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Minors Compromise
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Paul L. Alaga, Esq., appearing for Petitioner: Frank Rossi, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Siena Rossi present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Witness Anastasia Rossi appearing for Petitioner, sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $7500.00
Attorney's Fees: $1875.00 payable to Law Firm of Paul L. Alaga
Costs: $94.10
A net balance of $5530.90 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Wells Fargo Bank 490 Brannan Street, San Francisco, CA 94103 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on March 16, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
